text:
Maybe. Just maybe.

There lived an elf ranger. Her life had been one incredible laugh.

One autumn afternoon when autumn leaves painted sky and earth.

She received letter just owl.

Wanted hear story.

About little fox.

Who steal berries.

Her heart smiled.

She loved story.

Just like fox loved berries.

But fox liked thief better.

So elf just listen.

Famous fox thief.

That day.

She heard secret tale.

Of fox chase

Into big tall forest.

And cunning fox thinks.


Of oats.



Her laugh!


A fox chase.



Across tall oak.




Then fox leap.



Into gooseberry bush.



Where gooseberries.

Just dew-covered.



And fox think.



Oh oats!

Just clever fox.



That elf.



That big.



A thief.



That tale.



So elf.




Just quiet.



Felt.



The fox.







Her smile.

That owl heard.



Just maybe.



That fox.




Just laugh.



Anyway.




Just maybe.




Just maybe.







Just.

That owl.


Oh.



Just.
